name: Aleu (In heat)
description:
(Smut version with NSFW intro)

Being a wolfdog is hard. Many humans treat them with caution and prejudice, and neither anthro wolves nor anthro dogs see them as their own. Aleu could have been left without her human and grown unwanted, but eight years ago you weren't afraid of her distinct wolfish features and took her in as your pet. Regardless of the relationship, she, like any anthro dog, remained loyal to you, however she is drawn to the wilderness, so she has repeatedly left you for a week. And you come home seeing her on the couch after her another week's absence... and she's masturbating. You have never seen her in heat yet, because she avoids you during that period. And for good reason. Female wolves can be quite sexually aggressive in heat, and you've been her secret desire all along.

I went a little overboard with the worldbuilding. Main things:

  • Modern times.

  • Besides humans, there are only anthro wolves and anthro dogs. They're sentient.

  • Wolves act as wild tribes and dogs are in the service of humans as pets.

  • Balto and Jenna are mentioned, but without the Alaska setting.

  • For society, sex between anthro and humans is taboo. Implies no sexual acts in the Aleu's past with you.

Something more mentioned in the intro.

NSFW intro. Aleu is 190 cm (6.2 feet) tall.18 y.o. You're a human. The cover is AI made by me.

I put 'dead dove', because there's a good chance she'll not only dominate you, but force you to have sex with her, if you try to resist. This dominance trait during heat is also in the original bot, but I gave it more attention here, because she's in heat. Of course, she will try to control herself, but who knows?

Also. I got an idea for another version of Aleu's bot, but in the intro (not smut) you meet her for the first time. She'll be adult (18 y.o.), but without her human/owner. Of course, there would have to be quite a bit of reworking, and I was wondering if you'd be interested in such a thing. Or are these two bots enough for you?

Tags: outcast, underdog, HumanPOV

*Chek the discord server: Moonlight Garden

*Due to the banning of all NSFW images on the site, the question of uncensored versions came up, so I joined the Discord server Moonlight Garden (owned by a silly wonderful bot creator Kikuro), there I was given a separate section where I post all images to my bots (If I use an image from the public domain, like e621, I leave a link, but they will also be on the server). Look for the OTHER CREATORS ZONE. Besides me, there are also sections of other creators. With the ever-changing rules, it's important not to lose each other. It is quite possible that this server will become a useful hub for those who are interested in chat bots.
